question: If a photographer wanted to take a picture of the man holding the microphone, which direction should they look? Select from the following options: (A) Towards the right side of the stage. (B) Towards the back of the stage. (C) Towards the left side of the stage. (D) Towards the center of the stage.
gold_answer: Towards the right side of the stage
answer_choices: Towards the right side of the stage
Towards the back of the stage
Towards the left side of the stage
Towards the center of the stage
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
